title: RSMC: The Third Age (RuneScape in Minecraft)
description: RSMC: The Third Age is a Minecraft MOD that brings RuneScape to your Minecraft Worlds. RSMC can be played in Single Player or Multiplayer. It adds 24 Skills, Trading, GE, Bossing, Mini Games, Dungeons, and so much more
body:
# RSMC: The Third Age


## Bringing RuneScape to Minecraft, one block at a time!

RSMC: The Third Age is a Minecraft MOD that brings RuneScape to your Minecraft Worlds. RSMC can be played in Single Player or Multiplayer as it adds a TON of content, but to get the best experience it's recommended that it's played via Multiplayers. You will not find a better RuneScape MOD.


# FEATURES

-   24 Skills to level up.
-   Works in Single Player and Servers.
-   Working in-game economy that includes the Great Exchange that allows you to Buy/Sell items and it also works while players are online or offline.
-   In-Game Trading GUI between players.
-   Bosses: Barrow Brothers, Godwars (Soon), and more coming.
-   MOBS: Abyssal, Demons, Dragons and much more.  
-   Treasure Trails  
-   Mini-Games: Barrows, Godwars Dungeon (Soon) and, many more to come.
-   Handcrafted Dimensions for each Runecrafting Altar including "The Rune Abyss".
-   Spellbooks: Standard, Ancients, Lunar, and Abyssal Spellbook.
-   Advanced Plugin System unlike you've ever seen giving the Player Complete control of Exp Values, Editable or additional Shops, Spells, Mobs, Agility Courses and so much more.
  
  ***The Possibilities are truly endless and there is so much more in the works.***

# Requirements

**RSMC currently runs on Java 1.18.2**

**RSMC is updated to** [\[Forge Version: forge-1.18.2-40.2.0-installer\]](%28https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.18.2.html%29)

**RSMC Currently Requires 1 MOD to work**

[Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

# Additional Links

[GitHub](https://github.com/ahornerr/RSMC-Releases/releases/tag/0.14.13): Will always be the first place NEW updates are released.  

  
[Discord](https://discord.gg/EucxWhKH):  Will have the latest updates as soon as one is uploaded to GitHub  

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rsmc-the-third-age): Will always be updated as much as Possible  

[YouTube](https://youtu.be/sFZgq-zPkw8): Will consist of Trailers, Tutorials, Content Teases, and Major Update Releases.
  
[RSMC Trailer](https://youtu.be/sFZgq-zPkw8)
